scripts.dev: concurrently -n bridge,frontend -c blue,green "cd bridge && npx tsx --env-file ../.env index.ts" "cd frontend && npx vite --strictPort"
scripts.check: cd bridge && npm run check && cd ../frontend && npm run check
scripts.test: echo "No test suite configured yet. See mcp-servers/live2d/test.ts for the MCP server prototype test."
